name: orchard
description: Decentralized, privacy-preserving swarm-intelligence network powered by idle Apple devices (Foundation Models + Neural Engine).

name: parlo
description: An AI speaking partner for language learners that runs entirely on the phone — unlimited conversation roleplay and pronunciation feedback, offline, at a quarter of Speak's price.

name: perennial
description: A literature review that never goes stale: subscribe to a research question and get a versioned, citation-verified survey that ingests each week's papers and flags which claims are now supported, contradicted, or superseded — every reference verified to exist.

name: sitescribe
description: Offline AI field-documentation copilot: photograph, dictate, and auto-generate structured inspection reports, receipts, and job records at zero signal, syncing when coverage returns.

name: claimwatch
description: Patent & IP radar for IP-heavy startups: a weekly agent over USPTO/EPO/WIPO feeds maintains living dossiers per technology area and competitor — alerting on new filings, claim amendments, assignments, and lapses, every assertion checkable against the source.

name: selene
description: A cycle, fertility, and perimenopause tracker whose AI insight engine runs entirely on-device — no server to subpoena, breach, or sell data from, verifiable in airplane mode.
